𝗩𝗧-𝗖𝗟𝗜 | Interacting with the VirusTotal API and its threat intelligence data via a command-line interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Interacting with the VirusTotal API and its threat intelligence data via a command-line interface.
📅 Created: May 2018 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Retrieve information about files, URLs, domains, IP addresses
✅ Search for files and URLs using VirusTotal Intelligence query syntax
✅ Download files
✅ Manage LiveHunt YARA rules
✅ Launch and manage Retrohunt jobs


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 122 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 14 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The VirusTotal CLI is a command-line interface tool that allows users to interact with the VirusTotal API. It enables users to retrieve information about files, URLs, domains, and IP addresses, search for threats, download files, and manage YARA rules and Retrohunt jobs directly from their terminal.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/VirusTotal/vt-cli

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗨𝗫𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗬 | Providing an ultra-low latency remote desktop experience for Linux, particularly for gaming and power users who require fine-grained control over the streaming process.  🔥 Super Hot!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing an ultra-low latency remote desktop experience for Linux, particularly for gaming and power users who require fine-grained control over the streaming process.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Ultra-low latency remote desktop and game streaming
✅ Support for H.264 and H.265 (HEVC) codecs
✅ Hardware acceleration (NVENC, QSV, VAAPI, AMF)
✅ Video over MPEG-TS on UDP, Audio over UDP, Input over UDP
✅ Clipboard sync over UDP
✅ Surround Sound Support (5.1 / 7.1)
✅ Granular FFmpeg encoder control (GOP, QP/CRF, Preset, Tune, Pixel Format)
✅ Advanced capture methods (kmsgrab, x11grab)
✅ Secure handshake layer with rotating PIN


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 586 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 8 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LinuxPlay is an experimental, open-source remote desktop and game streaming solution for Linux hosts and Windows clients. It prioritizes ultra-low latency and granular control over codecs, transport, and capture methods, leveraging FFmpeg and UDP for efficient streaming.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Techlm77/LinuxPlay

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗚𝗡𝗘𝗪𝗦 | Programmatically accessing and retrieving news articles from Google News for various applications and analyses.  📈 Growing!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Programmatically accessing and retrieving news articles from Google News for various applications and analyses.
📅 Created: Feb 2021 • Updated: Mar 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Search Google News articles via API
✅ Return results in JSON format
✅ Fetch top news
✅ Search by keywords, major topics, geo-location, and site
✅ Retrieve full article content
✅ Supports 141+ countries and 41+ languages


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 949 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 144 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 43 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GNews is a lightweight Python package that provides an API to search for articles on Google News. It allows users to fetch top news, news by keywords, major topics, geo-location, or specific sites, and can also retrieve the full article content.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ranahaani/GNews

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗕𝟰 | Circumventing network censorship and restrictions imposed by Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Circumventing network censorship and restrictions imposed by Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) systems.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Bypasses Deep Packet Inspection (DPI)
✅ Uses netfilter queue manipulation
✅ Provides a web UI for management
✅ Real-time metrics (connections, packets, bandwidth)
✅ Logs streaming with filtering
✅ Supports custom configurations and geosite data
✅ Installable via script or Docker
✅ Builds from source for various architectures


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 39 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 9 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

B4 is a network packet processor designed to bypass Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) systems. It achieves this by manipulating network traffic using netfilter queueing on Linux systems, offering a user-friendly web interface for management and real-time monitoring.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/DanielLavrushin/b4

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗖𝗔𝗡𝗕𝗔𝗡 | A personal productivity tool for managing tasks and projects locally within a web browser, prioritizing speed, privacy, and a modern user interface.  

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A personal productivity tool for managing tasks and projects locally within a web browser, prioritizing speed, privacy, and a modern user interface.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local-First Architecture (Zero backend, offline capability, data privacy)
✅ Glassmorphism UI (Sleek, translucent, blurred, layered design)
✅ Hardware Accelerated Drag & Drop
✅ Advanced Theming Engine (Automatic Light/Dark mode detection)
✅ Internationalization (i18n) for multiple languages
✅ Highly Performant (Vanilla ES6+ JavaScript, no external libraries)


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 5 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 0 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Canban is a hyper-optimized, visually stunning, and privacy-focused local Kanban board application. It runs entirely in the browser with no backend or database, storing data locally using `localStorage` and featuring a premium Glassmorphism UI with advanced theming and internationalization.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/abdullokh-web/Canban
